home.name: Moroni
home.description: Developer with vision... virtual and professional

aboutme.description:
I am a Developer with a passion for technology and a clear focus on creating solutions that make a real impact.

I have worked on national and international projects using tools such as Java, Python, React, and Docker.

Today I combine development with Data Science and Machine Learning, building systems that not only work but also learn and evolve. I am defined by clear communication, leadership, and a strategic vision that goes beyond code.
